children.text: Apply when the facility is seeking a waiver of the 2.4 CNA requirement to meet individual patient needs but will provide a minimum of 3.5 direct care service hours. Facilities may only submit one Patient Needs Waiver and/or one Workforce Shortage Waiver application in the same year. If submitting both, only one may be approved.

children.text: Apply when the facility is seeking program flexibility to regulations. The request must include justification for the program flexibility, adequate description of the alternative concept, and documentation supporting that patient care will not be compromised. The facility may request program flexibility that is intended to be emergency or routine. An approved program flexibility request is for a limited term with a start and an end date. Facilities may submit more than one application as needed.

children.text: Apply when the facility is seeking a waiver of the 3.5 direct care service hours requirement and/or the 2.4 CNA hours requirement due to a workforce shortage of available and appropriate health care professionals and direct care givers. Facilities may only submit one Patient Needs Waiver and/or one Workforce Shortage Waiver application in the same year. If submitting both, only one may be approved.
